### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>coreos/stream-metadata-go (github.com/coreos/stream-metadata-go)</summary>

### [`v0.4.5`](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/stream-metadata-go/releases/tag/v0.4.5)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/stream-metadata-go/compare/v0.4.4...v0.4.5)

Changes:

-   Bump minimum supported Go version to 1.22
-   Add `Arch.OciImage` field to release metadata containing base OS OCI image
-   Add `OciImages` field to release index containing base OS OCI images

</details>
